summary: Comprehensive testing of Thrifty Curator reselling platform completed. Backend: 100% pass (21/21 tests). Frontend: All core features working. Fixed one bug in Report modal Select component.

fixed_issues.issue: SelectItem with empty string value causing React runtime error
fixed_issues.fix: Changed empty string value to 'all' and added conversion logic

passed_tests: Landing page loads with two-column layout
Logo displays correctly
All platform links (eBay, Poshmark, Mercari, Depop, Facebook) visible with target='_blank'
Connect links (TikTok, Facebook, Message Me) work correctly
QR code displays above share button
Share button visible and functional
Job Application form - all fields, checkboxes, radio buttons work
Job Application form - submission successful with success page
Consignment Inquiry form - all fields including item type checkboxes work
Consignment Inquiry form - dropdown select for item condition works
Consignment Inquiry form - submission successful
Consignment Agreement form - legal terms display
Consignment Agreement form - signature and date fields work
Consignment Agreement form - terms checkbox and submission work
Admin login with matthewjesusguzman1@gmail.com redirects to admin dashboard
Admin dashboard displays stats (employees, hours, shifts)
Admin can add new employee via modal
Admin can run shift reports with date range filters
Employee login redirects to employee dashboard
Employee can clock in - status changes to 'Currently Working'
Employee sees elapsed time timer when clocked in
Employee dashboard shows stats (week hours, total hours, shifts)
Backend: API root endpoint working
Backend: Admin passwordless login working
Backend: Invalid email returns 401
Backend: Auth requires valid token
Backend: Admin can create employees
Backend: Admin can delete employees
Backend: Admin can generate shift reports
Backend: Admin can view summary and all time entries
Backend: Employee clock in/out working
Backend: Double clock in blocked
Backend: Time summary calculation working
Backend: Job application submission working
Backend: Consignment inquiry submission working
Backend: Consignment agreement submission working
Backend: Employee cannot access admin routes (403)
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create test employees with prefix TEST_ and unique UUIDs for cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features pass. Fixed SelectItem empty value bug in AdminDashboard. Backend has comprehensive pytest tests at /app/backend/tests/test_thrifty_curator_api.py. Admin is pre-seeded as Matthew Guzman. Multiple test employees exist from backend tests.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Report modal crashed with 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string'
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: ShadCN UI's Select component requires non-empty string values for SelectItem. Line 371 had <SelectItem value=''>All Employees</SelectItem>
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Changed value to 'all' and added conversion logic: value='all' converts to empty string for API, empty string from state displays as 'all'
